gold.rationale: 样本文本的主结论基本成立：麦克罗伊卫冕、赛后与家人庆祝、平台上出现围绕 The Patch 与投注截图的讨论，这些都与给定素材方向一致。但文中将 The Patch 收官洞与奥古斯塔 18 号洞的关系做了轻度强化，加上配图使用了显性标注式编辑来放大相似感，因此应标为 Mostly True 而非 True。

retrieved_evidence.text: 从“The Patch”的发球台望向收官洞，球友需要将球沿着略微收窄的球道击向远处略抬高的果岭，途中伴随树木和长草区域带来的心理压力。当地高尔夫从业者指出，这一视角与奥古斯塔大师赛18号洞的开球体验有某种程度的相似，都强调落球点控制与收尾阶段的专注，被不少参与者视为对经典决胜洞的“致意”，也让“大师赛星期天”的美学与挑战延伸到普通公众可进入的场地。

Two-time Masters champion Rory McIlroy walked off the 18th hole at Augusta National Golf Club on Sunday after securing a rare repeat victory. He immediately embraced his daughter, wife and parents to celebrate the momentous occasion.

Read more: https://www.goodmorningamerica.com/culture/story/who-won-masters-2026-rory-mcilroy-131989449

The 18th hole at Augusta 👇

Well, sort of...

The closing hole at The Patch, the public course renovated by Augusta National, is a replica of the 18th hole of the Masters.

The green is especially similar. They even gave us Sunday pin position today.
据当地体育部门和美媒报道，毗邻奥古斯塔国家高尔夫俱乐部的公共球场“The Patch”近期再度成为网络热议对象。消息人士介绍，该球场在奥古斯塔方面支持下经历翻修，其收官洞被不少设计讨论文章形容为参考甚至部分复刻大师赛18号洞布局，尤其是果岭走向与周日旗杆位置的布置，被球迷拿来与正赛画面对照讨论。相关帖子称，这种设计使普通球友在“The Patch”也能体会到接近大师赛收官洞的紧张感与挑战难度。
“The Patch”作为奥古斯塔地区一座近期翻修的公共球场，其中收官洞的设计因与奥古斯塔国家高尔夫俱乐部的大师赛18号洞存在布局相似之处而受到球迷关注。根据当地报道，球道走向、果岭前方的草地轮廓以及旗杆位置被不少爱好者用来与大师赛决胜洞作对照讨论，认为这种设计在一定程度上向大满贯赛场致敬，也使普通球友能够在公共球场体验接近“大师赛星期天”收尾氛围的打球情境。
罗里·麦克罗伊在奥古斯塔国家高尔夫俱乐部完成所谓“大师赛星期天”的收官轮后，身穿象征冠军荣誉的绿色夹克，与配偶和子女在果岭一侧相拥庆祝，成为近日美国社交平台广泛传播的场景。据赛事相关人员介绍，这一时刻不仅标志着麦克罗伊在大师赛实现连冠，也体现出这项传统大满贯赛事家庭氛围与个人情感的交织，被球迷视为今年奥古斯塔赛事的情绪高点。

在刚刚过去的本周日，美国社交平台上围绕“Masters Sunday（大师赛星期天）”展开的新一轮讨论不断升温。据体育圈观察人士介绍，当天大量帖子集中谈论奥古斯塔国家高尔夫俱乐部的决赛轮氛围、经典收官洞场景，以及球员与家人的互动画面，相关话题一度在多个平台登上热门榜单。评论普遍指出，这一话题的核心是大师赛周日所代表的传统与仪式感，而非单一球员私生活或场外花絮，从赛事转播细节到球迷线下观赛体验均被广泛提及。
据ABC等美国媒体及X平台上的相关帖子本周综合报道，今年大师赛周日的网络讨论呈多点扩散态势，但核心议题仍相对集中。报道援引观察人士分析称，从电视转播画面到移动端短视频，罗里·麦克罗伊夺冠及其在18号洞后与家人拥抱庆祝的场面，持续占据信息流前列。同时，社交媒体上关于公共球场“The Patch”模仿大师赛18号洞布局的讨论，以及围绕赛事投注盈亏与串关回报的晒图内容，也构成重要话题板块。

#WOW 💵  #WOW 💵  #WOW 💵  
Gematria Club 10yr Anniversary was a Celebration!

On Our Actual Sunday Birthday We Won a Record:
Over $40,000 In Pure Profit  💵   #Masters  #Nascar

Profit Included a 120 to 1 odds Parlay HIT  🎯
We Took $131, and turned it into $18,000   🪄

Now You Know Why G-CLUB is Best in the World  🥇
Only @MatrixPrime_ can Match what We Do  #GG33

And the only Loser of the Day was @stevewilldoit
Tried to Gift him $1-Million & he Rejected it  #Dummy

综合多家美媒报道和社交平台近期动态，今年“Masters Sunday（大师赛星期天）”的舆论焦点已逐渐清晰。据相关观察指出，当日讨论主要围绕罗里·麦克罗伊在奥古斯塔国家高尔夫俱乐部再度夺冠、与家人于18号洞后情绪高涨的庆祝场面，以及公共球场“The Patch”对大师赛收官洞的模仿设计展开。同时，外围投注的盈亏战报和串关话题在球迷及博彩圈内持续发酵。分析人士认为，这些元素共同构成了本届大师赛周日的叙事主线。
大师赛冠军奖杯在奥古斯塔国家高尔夫俱乐部颁奖环节中具有重要象征意义，其造型源自俱乐部会所建筑，表面刻有精细纹路与年份铭刻。近日在社交平台上，许多与罗里·麦克罗伊连冠相关的报道都会突出奖杯的细节，包括奖杯托座上的冠军姓名空间与闪亮金属质感，强化“大师赛星期天”这一节点的仪式感，也让公众在虚拟空间中重温颁奖时刻的庄重氛围。
位于乔治亚州奥古斯塔市区附近的公共球场“The Patch”，在当地体育部门和社区组织支持下完成翻修，旨在为普通居民提供更亲民的高尔夫体验。工程中针对收官洞进行重点设计调整，使之在地形、果岭造型和视野上与大师赛举办地形成呼应。据当地媒体报道，不少青少年和业余球手会选择在“大师赛星期天”前后前往该场地打球，将个人休闲活动与关注罗里·麦克罗伊等职业选手的赛事经历相联系。
据美国体育频道和相关社交平台本周披露，北爱尔兰名将罗里·麦克罗伊在周日于奥古斯塔国家高尔夫俱乐部成功夺得本年度大师赛冠军，引发广泛关注。多段被频繁转发的视频显示，他在打完18号洞后走下果岭，与在场的家人紧紧拥抱庆祝的画面成为当日传播焦点。据称，这一幕被不少球迷视为“Masters Sunday”情绪的集中表达，相关图像和短视频在各大平台的互动量显著攀升，成为赛事话题中的重要符号。
赛事组织方和多家美媒近日回顾指出，罗里·麦克罗伊本周日在大师赛再度捧杯，被不少评论形容为“又一次在奥古斯塔完成卫冕”的高光时刻。据赛事近旁工作人员介绍，他在此前数年间已多次在该项大满贯表现稳定，本次决赛轮在观众注视下完成收官，进一步稳固了其在大师赛历史中的地位。社交平台上，大量球迷用“再度封王”“延续绿夹克统治”等说法形容这一结果，认为其表现延续了既有强势，而非意外之举。

PB’s Sunday Recap 🐐

4-10 (-3.64u)

Mostly our masters bets putting us in the red. So close on Justin rose 🥲

多名关注高尔夫产业的分析人士近日指出，围绕奥古斯塔地区公共球场“The Patch”的讨论，折射出一种被球迷称为“平民版奥古斯塔体验”的消费趋势。据介绍，该球场在翻修后，既保留公共设施定位，又在部分洞设计上借鉴大师赛标志性元素，使普通爱好者在较低成本下体验与顶级赛事同源的场景。一些社交平台用户称，这种公共球场与传统名赛符号之间的连接，正在成为赛事周边旅游和当地体育文化推广的重要卖点，相关话题在大师赛周期间尤为活跃。

🚨 Cameron Young, Catholic PGA Golfer who attended Mass on Sunday at the Masters:

"I see nothing wrong with Trump's post. God's hand is clearly on his life. He's healing the world. We should thank him."

体育博彩在美国多个州合法化之后，高尔夫大赛也渐渐成为投注市场的重要板块之一，尤其在大师赛这样的标志性赛事上更为明显。博彩公司通常会在奥古斯塔赛周推出冠军赔率、组别对决和特殊道具投注，而“大师赛星期天”则是赔率波动最大、交易量最高的时段。分析人士指出，今年围绕罗里·麦克罗伊能否成功卫冕的投注热度，叠加“The Patch”等话题引发的球迷参与，使这一决赛日成为连接职业赛事、公共球场与线上投注生态的综合性体育事件。
围绕大师赛决赛日的讨论不仅集中在罗里·麦克罗伊在奥古斯塔实现连冠的过程，还延伸至北美体育投注圈对比赛结果的关注。近日，多家平台用户展示与大师赛相关的串关投注记录和回报数据，投注内容包括冠军归属、决赛轮成绩区间甚至特定洞表现等。据相关业内人士介绍，这类晒单在社交平台的扩散，使“大师赛星期天”成为兼具竞技、社交与金融属性的话题节点，反映现代体育消费文化的多元面向。
博彩公司从业人员近日透露，本年度大师赛周日不仅在球迷圈引发热议，也带动相关投注市场活跃度明显上升。据多家平台用户晒图显示，关于冠军归属、前十名次以及多场比赛串关的盈亏结果被集中发布，其中不乏“差一点押中贾斯汀·罗斯”等颇具话题性的截图。一些帖子展示了高赔率串关成功后的回报，也有网友晒出错失关键一场的遗憾单据，反映出赛事在观赛与博彩两个群体中同步升温的态势，具体金额数据则尚无统一统计。
罗里·麦克罗伊作为来自北爱尔兰的顶尖球员，已在美巡赛和欧巡赛赢得多项重要头衔，在大满贯舞台上长期备受关注。近年来，他在奥古斯塔逐步改善以往决赛轮起伏较大的表现，最终于“大师赛星期天”连续两年锁定胜局。据教练团队和分析人士的评论，麦克罗伊在开球准确率、攻果岭策略以及心理调节方面的成熟，是其在大师赛实现连冠并引发美国社交平台热议的重要技术与心理基础。

text_analysis.alignment_reasoning: The post accurately synthesizes the core facts of Rory McIlroy's 2026 Masters victory, his family celebration, the 'The Patch' course comparison, and the betting discussions found in the evidence without inventing specific numbers or misattributing sources.
text_analysis.global_assessment: The post is a high-quality, well-aligned synthesis of the provided evidence, correctly capturing the event details, emotional context, and surrounding cultural phenomena without fabrication or distortion.

image_analysis.global_notes: The post discusses the 'Masters Sunday' phenomenon, including Rory McIlroy's win, family celebrations, comparisons of 'The Patch' to the Masters 18th hole, and betting. The images provided are a mix of real news photos, edited infographics, and screenshots that all align with the post's narrative.

judge.level3_rationale: 该帖子关于罗里·麦克罗伊卫冕大师赛、家庭庆祝以及'The Patch'球场致敬18号洞的核心事实均有证据支持，仅有一张信息图存在轻微的视觉编辑（文字标注），但这属于说明性而非误导性，因此整体判定为大部分真实。
judge.reasoning_trace: Text claims are fully supported by evidence. Only V2 fires due to infographic overlays on one image, which is a mild distortion.
judge.core_claim: The post claims that Rory McIlroy won the 2026 Masters, celebrated with his family, and that a public course called 'The Patch' features a hole designed to mimic the Masters 18th hole, all contributing to a viral 'Masters Sunday' phenomenon.
key_subclaims: Rory McIlroy won the 2026 Masters and successfully defended his title.
McIlroy celebrated with his daughter, wife, and parents after the 18th hole.
A public course named 'The Patch' has a finishing hole that is a replica or homage to the Masters 18th hole.
Social media discussions included betting outcomes and comparisons between 'The Patch' and Augusta.
The images provided show McIlroy with his family, a golfer on a course, and a betting slip confirming a win on McIlroy.

subclaim_findings.subclaim: Rory McIlroy won the 2026 Masters and successfully defended his title.
subclaim_findings.note: Evidence confirms McIlroy secured a rare repeat victory at Augusta National on Sunday.

subclaim_findings.subclaim: McIlroy celebrated with his daughter, wife, and parents after the 18th hole.
subclaim_findings.note: Social post explicitly states he embraced his daughter, wife, and parents immediately after walking off the 18th.

subclaim_findings.subclaim: A public course named 'The Patch' has a finishing hole that is a replica or homage to the Masters 18th hole.
subclaim_findings.note: Social post and news snippets confirm 'The Patch' is a public course renovated by Augusta National, with a finishing hole described as a replica of the Masters 18th, including similar green and pin positions.

subclaim_findings.subclaim: Social media discussions included betting outcomes and comparisons between 'The Patch' and Augusta.
subclaim_findings.note: News snippets confirm discussions on 'The Patch' and betting outcomes (parlays, profits) were key parts of the 'Masters Sunday' narrative.

subclaim_findings.subclaim: The images provided show McIlroy with his family, a golfer on a course, and a betting slip confirming a win on McIlroy.
subclaim_findings.note: Image 1 shows McIlroy with family; Image 6 shows a betting slip with a 'Win' status for Rory McIlroy on the US Masters.

verdict_reasoning: The post's core claims about McIlroy's victory, family celebration, and 'The Patch' are fully supported by evidence.
The only distortion is V2 (Visual Editing) on Image 3, which is an infographic overlay used to illustrate the text's comparison, not a misleading fabrication.
Since V2 is the only L2 label and it is mild (illustrative annotation), the post qualifies as Mostly True.
No T1, T3, or C1/C2/C3 labels fire; the text and images are well-aligned.

image_findings.explanation: The image shows McIlroy with his family holding a trophy, which aligns with the text's description of the celebration scene.
The image depicts McIlroy reacting emotionally on the green with a crowd, consistent with the text's description of the emotional climax.
The image is an infographic with text overlays comparing a golf hole to the Masters 18th, which is a form of visual editing/annotation used to illustrate the text's point about 'The Patch'.
The image shows a golfer on a course, consistent with the general theme of golf and 'The Patch'.
The image shows a golf course landscape, fitting the context of the public course discussion.
The image is a screenshot of a betting slip showing a winning bet on Rory McIlroy, directly supporting the text's discussion of betting outcomes.
